task_completion.description: Verify that the Vendor Name is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'GreenScape Materials Co.' in the Vendor Name input field or on the saved record view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Phone, Email, and Website are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Phone '512-555-8734' (or '5125558734'), Email 'orders@greenscapematerials.com', and Website 'www.greenscapematerials.com' (or 'greenscapematerials.com') in their respective fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the full address is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Street '4200 Industrial Parkway', City 'Austin', State 'Texas', Postal Code '78745', and Country 'United States' in the address fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the vendor description is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Primary supplier for landscaping materials including mulch, stone, and irrigation supplies. Net 30 payment terms.' in the description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new vendor record has been successfully saved in the CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved vendor detail view (non-editable text fields), a success notification, or the vendor appearing in the Vendors list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Vtiger CRM application open, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual CRM form fields, not a generic text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the record rather than just filling out the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the record in a saved state (detail view) or a confirmation message, rather than just an unsaved, filled-out form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Vendor Name: 'GreenScape Materials Co.'. Expected Phone: '512-555-8734' (or '5125558734'). Expected Email: 'orders@greenscapematerials.com'. Expected Website: 'www.greenscapematerials.com' (or 'greenscapematerials.com'). Expected Address: 4200 Industrial Parkway, Austin, Texas, 78745, United States. Expected Description: 'Primary supplier for landscaping materials including mulch, stone, and irrigation supplies. Net 30 payment terms.'
